chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5879 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders as to maintainability of petition ---------------------------------------------- 14.10.2025 This petition was last taken up on 21.02.2025, when the question of maintainability was to be addressed. Today, none present for the petitioner, without intimation. The question of maintainability is still outstanding. It appears that the learned counsel for the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
